mentions.note: Botched IPO pricing; opened at $370 vs. expected $170–180 range and has collapsed since. Caller Angel underwater on recent purchase. Classic example of overallocation and mispricing Cramer fears for SpaceX this week.

New CEO Todd Boose has fixed operational issues (store standards, supply chain, labor efficiency). Up 98% in past year from Cramer's initial recommendation; personal store visit confirms continued excellence.
